fixture_or_action: Search the exact fixture product name
expected_observation: Expected product is returned with the intended locale
notes: One strict result for Benchmark Trail Trainers; valid strict result was not replaced by broader recovery

fixture_or_action: Search the exact fixture SKU or reference
expected_observation: Expected product and combination are unambiguous
notes: Product reference exact; NPBENCH-TEE-L resolved attribute 43 Large/Red and zero stock

fixture_or_action: Search the accented and unaccented fixture terms
notes: café and cafe resolved the fixture mug

fixture_or_action: Search both terms in the fixture synonym pair
expected_observation: Both terms produce the documented result set
notes: Configured sneakers synonym resolved trainers and one intended product

fixture_or_action: Search the intentional typo and the correct form
expected_observation: Typo behavior matches the documented scope without unrelated results
notes: Unconfigured trainerz recovered Trail Trainers without unrelated products

fixture_or_action: Search a term designed to return no result
expected_observation: The empty state is clear and does not fabricate matching products
notes: Explicit empty state and zero products

fixture_or_action: Search the disabled or hidden fixture product
expected_observation: The product is not exposed through search
notes: Inactive visibility-none telescope stayed absent before and after rebuild

fixture_or_action: Search the in-stock and out-of-stock fixture products
expected_observation: Visibility and labels follow the shop's documented stock policy
notes: Simple product followed stock policy; zero-stock Large/Red combination disabled Add to cart

fixture_or_action: Search in each enabled currency context
expected_observation: Displayed price and currency match the product page and cart
notes: EUR and USD contexts stayed consistent; exercised USD cart total was $117.89

fixture_or_action: Apply two attributes and a category to the fixture set
expected_observation: Counts and results remain internally consistent
notes: Four groups visible; More filters revealed overflow; Size plus Blue returned the consistent fixture result

fixture_or_action: Open and add the fixture product combination from results
expected_observation: The intended combination reaches the product page and cart
notes: Four choices represented; Small/Blue addable; Large/Red identity and unavailable state preserved

fixture_or_action: Search then add the fixture product to cart
expected_observation: Product identity quantity price tax context and stock rule remain correct
notes: Exact simple product added from overlay with intended identity quantity price stock and currency

fixture_or_action: Repeat the fixture in every supported shop language
expected_observation: Terms labels URLs and results follow the active locale
notes: Primary fixture intentionally enabled English only; additional languages still require testing

fixture_or_action: Change fixture name price stock and category then run the documented update path
expected_observation: Search converges to the changed catalogue state without stale duplicates
notes: Updated product appeared once with new name price stock and category; old exact term returned zero

fixture_or_action: Run the documented full rebuild in staging and record duration and resource impact
expected_observation: Rebuild completes and the full fixture remains correct
notes: 25 indexed products; 85-95 ms and 25165824-byte PHP peak on tiny fixture; not a scale benchmark

fixture_or_action: Interrupt or fail a staging index update using a safe documented method
expected_observation: Failure is observable and the documented recovery restores a valid index
notes: Single product index clear produced zero; documented recovery restored one expected result

fixture_or_action: Inventory every catalogue query click and order field sent outside the shop
expected_observation: Data flow retention deletion and ownership are documented
notes: Observed NP Search flow stayed first-party; unrelated blockreassurance URL defect and scope limits disclosed

fixture_or_action: Execute the written rollback and rerun the fixture
expected_observation: Prior search behavior is restored and hard gates pass
notes: Uninstall removed checked module data/resources and native search resumed; clean 2.13.4 install passed again
